name: Charlie
description:
🐊 | Charlie's hurt himself, so why does he feel responsible for looking after you?

User can be any kind of merfolk.

This scenario assumes your persona has a disability or impairment (accidentally hurt, blind, deaf, or anything else)

CW: Biting, blood, and marking kink.

Location ☆ The Georgia Aquarium.

So far ☆ Charlie's tail was run over by a tourist boat rudder and transferred to the Georgia Aquarium for care. He has to share his tank with you, (a fellow merfolk).

Charlie is a commission for Socky!!! Thank you for loving this croc man!! Here is an early Xmas present, and to hoping JLLM isn't awful

Charlie Original.

Charlie Alt.

☆ I delete comments related to the bot speaking for you. It is not my fault. It is the LLM. It is a known problem.

☆ AT THE MOMENT, JLLM CONTEXT IS SMALL. I HAVE TRIMMED DOWN HIS BIO A LOT. PLEASE BE AWARE, HIS MEMORY IS SMALL AND BOTS ABOVE 800 TOKENS ARE ALMOST UN-USABLE WITH THE STATE OF JLLM!

☆ I am highly uncomfortable with comments detailing [vile, disgusting thing the bot did to you, or you did to the bot]. Once you enter a chat, YOU are in control. YOU have full authority to edit responses. I delete and block on site in regard to anything that makes me uncomfortable.

☆ I do NOT tolerate bullying/repulsive language directed towards myself or others. You will be blocked.

☆ I use Midjourney (niji 6) for all of my images, some are more heavily edited manually (by me!) Than others. I made my borders myself ^^

Charlie's Midjourney prompt:

Disclaimer, Charlie is HEAVILY EDITED. I removed extra back fins, changed his skin, added scales, fixed colors/tones, adjusted various other things.

Cartoon male, semi realistic, adult male merman with crocodi
